title: Pinky
description: Modpack with many mods that make minecraft look more fancy and have better gameplay
body:
#  Pinky

Pinky is an extensive Minecraft modpack crafted to significantly enhance the gameplay experience and make it much more engaging. It features a large collection of mods focused on performance optimization, graphical improvements, quality-of-life features, and introducing exciting new gameplay elements.

Good Survival is the ideal choice for players seeking a richer, more challenging, and visually stunning survival adventure in Minecraft.

## From where are the mods?

They are all from modrinth so don't worry there's no virus or anything like that

## Did my computer will explode with that amout of mods?

Mods was test'ed on my laptop that have
- GPU: GTX 1650
- CPU: AMD Ryzen 5 4600H
- RAM: 8GB
- And it works (With BSL Classic sharders)

Tested on pc too!
- GPU: RTX 5070 TI
- CPU: Intel Core i5-14400F
- RAM: 32GB
- 60 FPS (Vsync) very smooth gameplay
